indoorPositioningHint: Rooms are read from ioBroker enum.rooms. Learned areas, beacons and fingerprints are stored below iobapp.0.indoor.
indoorDashboardHint: Overview of learned areas, discovered BLE beacons and device room estimates.
indoorBeaconsHint: BLE devices discovered by the iOS app.
noIndoorDevices: No device has sent indoor positioning data yet.
noIndoorAreas: No area has been learned yet. Start learning in the iOS app.
noIndoorBeacons: No BLE beacon has been discovered yet.
selectIndoorArea: Select an area to inspect its fingerprint.
emptyFingerprint: This area has no fingerprint beacons yet.
indoorBeaconManagementHint: Mark fixed beacons, mobile devices and ignored signals for room learning.
